TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hagaparis, title = Hagaparis, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hagaparis} }

S.FORM: alang Hagaparis ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 35 buwan, 113 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%, Amis 3%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Hagaparis hya' ga Ryohen. tay mkyahu' na Hagaparis hya' ga Buta. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Hagaparis ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Nango go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 35 buwan, 113 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 95%, Amis 3%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Hagaparis hya' ga Ryohen. tay mkyahu' na Hagaparis hya' ga Buta. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħaɣaparis~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu naŋo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na ħaɣaparis~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa rjoħen. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħaɣaparis~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa βuta. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
